tests.name: timeline/Summary renders current commit metadata and message details
timeline/Summary renders a root-commit badge and omits the body for a simple one-line root commit
timeline/Summary collapses the current commit details behind a toggle
timeline/Summary omits the commit-kind badge for ordinary single-parent commits
